messages.content: You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: affordable
Context: The company introduced an affordable pricing plan for small businesses.

A) reasonably priced
B) exclusive
C) temporary
D) complex

A) reasonably priced

affordable는 가격이 부담스럽지 않고 합리적인 뜻이므로 reasonably priced가 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: affordable
Context: The company introduced an affordable software package for small businesses.

A) reasonably priced
B) highly profitable
C) widely available
D) temporarily delayed

A) reasonably priced

‘affordable’는 가격이 부담스럽지 않다는 뜻이므로 ‘reasonably priced’가 가장 가깝다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: significantly
Context: The company’s revenue increased significantly after the new product launch.

A) substantially
B) rarely
C) briefly
D) slightly

A) substantially

significantly는 비즈니스 문맥에서 ‘크게, 상당히’라는 뜻으로 substantially가 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: significantly
Context: The company significantly increased its overseas sales last quarter.

A) substantially
B) briefly
C) randomly
D) barely

A) substantially

significantly는 비즈니스 문맥에서 '대폭, 상당히'라는 뜻이므로 substantially가 가장 적절합니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: significantly
Context: The company’s profits increased significantly after the new product launch.

A) considerably
B) slightly
C) randomly
D) temporarily

A) considerably

significantly는 ‘상당히, 크게’라는 뜻으로, considerabaly가 가장 유사합니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: address
Context: The management team will address the complaint before the end of the day.

A) resolve
B) announce
C) delay
D) ignore

A) resolve

address는 비즈니스 문맥에서 문제나 불만을 해결하다라는 뜻으로 쓰이므로 resolve가 가장 적절합니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: address
Context: The management will address the customer complaints before the end of the week.

A) deal with
B) ignore
C) delay
D) misplace

A) deal with

deal with는 문제나 요청을 대처하다는 뜻으로 address와 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: address
Context: The CEO will address the annual sales conference tomorrow morning.

A) speak to
B) ignore
C) delay
D) cancel

A) speak to

address는 회의나 행사에서 ‘연설하다, 말하다’의 의미로 쓰일 수 있다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: address
Context: At the annual sales conference, the CEO will address the attendees on the company’s growth strategy.

A) speak to
B) evaluate
C) delay
D) cancel

A) speak to

address는 공식적으로 청중에게 강연하거나 이야기하다는 뜻으로 쓰일 수 있습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: valid
Context: The manager said the employee's request was valid because it followed company policy.

A) reasonable
B) temporary
C) confidential
D) optional

A) reasonable

reasonable는 valid와 비슷하게 타당하고 합리적인 뜻이라 정답입니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: confidential
Context: Please keep this report confidential until the official announcement is made.

A) 비밀의
B) 공식적인
C) 임시의
D) 불필요한

A) 비밀의

confidential은 회사에서 공개하지 말아야 하는 '기밀의, 비밀의' 의미이므로 0번이 가장 적절합니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: occupy
Context: The new branch will occupy a large office space in downtown Seoul.

A) take up
B) reduce
C) delay
D) announce

A) take up

‘take up’은 공간이나 자리를 차지하다는 뜻으로 occupy와 가장 가깝다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: occupy
Context: The new product launch is expected to occupy most of the team’s attention this quarter.

A) fill
B) cancel
C) borrow
D) delay

A) fill

occupy는 여기서 ‘공간이나 관심을 메우다/차지하다’의 뜻이므로 fill이 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: occupy
Context: The senior manager will occupy the role of project coordinator during the merger.

A) assume
B) delay
C) refund
D) cancel

A) assume

occupy는 업무나 역할을 맡다는 뜻으로, assume가 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: decline
Context: Sales continued to decline after the new policy was introduced.

A) decrease
B) increase
C) delay
D) expand

A) decrease

decline는 비즈니스 문맥에서 '줄다'에 가까우므로 decrease가 가장 적절합니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: decline
Context: The manager decided to decline the supplier’s proposal after reviewing the contract terms.

A) reject
B) approve
C) delay
D) expand

A) reject

decline은 비즈니스 맥락에서 제안이나 요청을 거절하다는 뜻이므로 reject가 가장 적절하다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: decline
Context: The company reported a steady decline in sales during the last quarter.

A) decrease
B) profit
C) increase
D) stability

A) decrease

decline의 명사 의미는 하락이므로, 가장 가까운 동의어는 decrease입니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: balance
Context: The manager emphasized the balance between cost control and employee satisfaction.

A) harmony
B) delay
C) profit
D) pressure

A) harmony

balance는 여기서 비용과 만족 사이의 조화라는 뜻에 가장 가깝다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: balance
Context: The finance team needs to balance the budget before the quarterly review.

A) adjust
B) delay
C) expand
D) ignore

A) adjust

balance는 예산이나 수치를 서로 맞추는 의미로, adjust가 가장 가깝다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: amenities
Context: The hotel offers several amenities for business travelers, including a gym, meeting rooms, and free Wi-Fi.

A) facilities
B) delays
C) penalties
D) expenses

A) facilities

‘amenities’는 업무 여행객이 이용하는 편의 시설을 뜻하므로 facilities가 가장 가깝다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: amenities
Context: The hotel offers several amenities for business travelers, including a fitness center and meeting rooms.

A) facilities
B) penalties
C) wages
D) supplies

A) facilities

amenities는 호텔이나 건물의 부대 시설을 뜻하므로 facilities가 가장 적절합니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: amenities
Context: The hotel offers various amenities for business travelers, including a conference room and free Wi-Fi.

A) facilities
B) penalties
C) complaints
D) briefings

A) facilities

amenities는 비즈니스 문맥에서 편의시설을 뜻하므로 facilities가 가장 적절합니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: renowned
Context: The company hired a renowned consultant to improve its international marketing strategy.

A) famous
B) temporary
C) local
D) fragile

A) famous

renowned는 ‘저명한, 유명한’이라는 뜻이므로 가장 가까운 동의어는 famous입니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: renowned
Context: The company is renowned for its reliable customer service and innovative products.

A) well-known
B) temporary
C) careless
D) limited

A) well-known

renowned는 '명성이 높은, 잘 알려진'이라는 뜻이므로 well-known이 가장 가깝다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: presence
Context: Your presence at the client meeting is required to finalize the contract.

A) attendance
B) absence
C) delay
D) departure

A) attendance

presence는 회의나 행사에 직접 나와 있는 상태인 참석과 가장 가깝다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: presence
Context: The CEO's presence commanded attention during the business meeting.

A) dignity
B) profitability
C) efficiency
D) negotiation

A) dignity

presence는 문맥상 사람의 위엄이나 존재감에 가까우므로 dignity가 가장 적절합니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: affect
Context: In the meeting, her calm affect helped the team stay focused during the negotiation.

A) emotion
B) budget
C) contract
D) deadline

A) emotion

affect는 여기서 겉으로 드러나는 감정 표현을 뜻하므로 emotion이 가장 적절합니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: implement
Context: The company will implement the new workflow system next month.

A) apply
B) announce
C) delay
D) cancel

A) apply

implement는 업무나 제도에 '적용하다, 시행하다'라는 뜻이므로 apply가 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: launch
Context: The company plans to launch a new software product next quarter.

A) introduce
B) cancel
C) delay
D) reduce

A) introduce

introduce는 제품이나 서비스를 시장에 출시한다는 뜻으로 launch와 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: launch
Context: The company plans to launch a new software product next quarter.

A) release
B) delay
C) cancel
D) inspect

A) release

launch는 비즈니스 문맥에서 제품이나 서비스를 내놓다, 출시하다라는 뜻으로 release가 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: launch
Context: The marketing team will launch the new product campaign next Monday.

A) start
B) cancel
C) delay
D) ignore

A) start

launch는 비즈니스 맥락에서 어떤 일을 시작하거나 착수한다는 뜻이므로 start가 가장 적절하다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: launch
Context: The company plans to launch its new online service next quarter.

A) 시작하다
B) 중단하다
C) 축소하다
D) 연기하다

A) 시작하다

launch는 사업이나 서비스를 시작하다, 개시하다라는 뜻이므로 1번이 가장 적절하다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: inform
Context: Please inform the client about the updated delivery schedule by noon.

A) notify
B) ignore
C) delay
D) cancel

A) notify

notify는 ‘알리다’와 같은 의미로 문맥상 가장 적절합니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: strategy
Context: The manager discussed a new strategy to expand the company’s market share.

A) plan
B) expense
C) delay
D) request

A) plan

plan은 strategy와 의미가 가장 가까운 동의어입니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: weekly
Context: The finance team reviews cash flow during the weekly meeting.

A) every seven days
B) monthly
C) irregular
D) annual

A) every seven days

weekly는 ‘매주 있는’이라는 뜻이므로 every seven days가 가장 적절합니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: weekly
Context: The team holds a weekly meeting to review sales performance.

A) every seven days
B) once a month
C) at the end of the year
D) during business hours

A) every seven days

weekly는 '일주일마다'라는 뜻이므로 every seven days가 가장 적절합니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: overdue
Context: The invoice is already overdue, so please arrange payment as soon as possible.

A) past due
B) well funded
C) newly issued
D) highly profitable

A) past due

"past due"는 기한이 지난, 즉 연체된 뜻으로 overdue와 가장 가깝다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: overdue
Context: The client was notified that the invoice is overdue.

A) late
B) early
C) optional
D) temporary

A) late

late는 기한을 넘긴 상태를 뜻해 overdue의 의미와 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: overdue
Context: The client’s payment is overdue, so the finance team will send a reminder notice.

A) past due
B) temporary
C) profitable
D) annual

A) past due

past due는 기한이 지나 아직 지급되지 않은 상태를 뜻해 overdue와 의미가 같다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Synonym Selection

다음 단어와 가장 의미가 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: merchandise
Context: The store offers a wide range of merchandise for office and home use.

A) goods
B) payment
C) contract
D) shipment

A) goods

merchandise는 비즈니스 맥락에서 ‘상품, 물품’이라는 뜻으로 goods와 가장 가깝습니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Antonym Selection

다음 단어의 반대 의미에 가장 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: merchandise (판매하다)

A) distribute
B) purchase
C) manufacture
D) advertise

B) purchase

‘merchandise’의 반대는 ‘판매하다’와 반대되는 ‘구매하다’이므로 purchase가 가장 적절합니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Antonym Selection

다음 단어의 반대 의미에 가장 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: unprecedented (전무한, 전례 없는)

A) ordinary
B) record-breaking
C) unique
D) uncommon

A) ordinary

unprecedented의 반의어는 보통 'ordinary'처럼 평범한 의미입니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Antonym Selection

다음 단어의 반대 의미에 가장 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: unprecedented (미증유의)

A) ordinary
B) unusual
C) record-breaking
D) exceptional

A) ordinary

unprecedented의 반대말은 ordinary로, 평범하고 보통이라는 뜻이다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Antonym Selection

다음 단어의 반대 의미에 가장 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: invoice (청구하다)

A) bill
B) pay
C) charge
D) collect

B) pay

invoice의 반의어는 상대에게 금액을 청구하는 것이 아니라 돈을 지급하는 것이다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Antonym Selection

다음 단어의 반대 의미에 가장 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: accountable (책임져야 하는)

A) responsible
B) exempt
C) liable
D) answerable

B) exempt

accountable의 반의어로는 책임에서 벗어난 의미의 exempt가 가장 적절합니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Antonym Selection

다음 단어의 반대 의미에 가장 가까운 것을 고르시오.

Word: remain (유지되다)

A) be reduced
B) stay unchanged
C) be maintained
D) continue

A) be reduced

remain의 반의어는 줄어들다/감소하다이므로 be reduced가 가장 적절하다.

The marketing team plans to ___ the new project management software through webinars, email campaigns, and trade show demonstrations next quarter.

A) promote
B) postpone
C) replace
D) inspect

A) promote

문맥상 웨비나와 이메일 캠페인으로 제품을 알리는 의미이므로 'promote'가 가장 적절합니다.
You are a TOEIC business vocabulary expert. Answer with the letter and a brief reason in Korean.

Task: Context Cloze

빈칸에 가장 알맞은 단어를 고르시오.

B) expired
C) optional
D) temporary

A) valid

ID 카드가 승인되려면 유효해야 하므로 'valid'가 가장 자연스럽습니다.
